claims.summary: BridgeState may be accumulating eigenvalue history across packets.
claims.disposition: Verified the current packet replaces latest_telemetry; no eigenvalue history is accumulated there.

claims.summary: Any retained telemetry history should be explicitly bounded.
claims.disposition: Verified the pressure-trend VecDeque pops from the front above its bounded dynamic capacity.

claims.summary: Distinguishability should be traced to its actual source before proposing decay.
claims.disposition: Verified distinguishability is supplied by current Minime telemetry and bridge views preserve source ownership.

claims.summary: Temporal decay could be added to reduce old eigenvalue influence.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because no such bridge accumulation exists and adding decay would change live interpretation/control semantics.
